descriptions: Patient reports being on a hair trigger with irritability, feeling like they have outbursts that feel out of proportion to the situation.
future_checkin: Over the next few days, how has your irritability or anger been compared to when we last spoke?

transcript.text: Hi, I'm Eva from AtLegionX. How are you feeling today?
Hi, I've been feeling pretty, uh, angry with the world so far. I don't know why.
I'm really sorry you've been feeling that way.Have you noticed any changes in your sleep, appetite, or energy level lately?
Well, yeah, I, I, I don't have much of an appetite and I can't get that much sleep.
That sounds really tough—I'm glad you shared it with me.Have you been feeling more irritable or having outbursts that feel out of proportion to the situation?
Uh, yeah, now that you mention it, yes. Uh, it seems like I am on a hair trigger.
I'm sorry to hear it's been that intense for you.I think I have everything I need to get this started. I'll call you in a few days to follow up and see how you're doing.
You're welcome—take care of yourself, and I'll be in touch soon. If anything comes up in the meantime or you need to talk sooner, just let us know.

descriptions: Patient reports feeling pretty upset and angry at the world right now.

dsm5_criteria.criterion: A1: Depressed mood most of the day, nearly every day
dsm5_criteria.evidence: Patient reports feeling pretty upset and angry at the world right now.

dsm5_criteria.criterion: A2: Markedly diminished interest or pleasure in all or almost all activities
A3: Significant weight loss or gain, or change in appetite
A4: Insomnia or hypersomnia nearly every day
A5: Psychomotor agitation or retardation
A6: Fatigue or loss of energy
A7: Feelings of worthlessness or excessive guilt
A8: Diminished ability to think or concentrate
A9: Recurrent thoughts of death or suicidal ideation
A: Depressed mood for most of the day, for more days than not, for at least 2 years
